query:
codex context meter 删除掉； 
新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要
tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要
果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要

transcript.content: 我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要

decision.archive_summary: Current active topic is the standalone VS Code extension for Codex context status. Earlier detour about Project Assistant is resolved and should not stay raw. Preserve as durable guidance: keep strict boundary from Project Assistant; unify into one extension/entry point; status bar should stay brief; click opens a small detail window; details can auto-refresh; `live-panel.md` is no longer the main UI and was removed. Recent open question/answer to retain in raw context: behavior across new windows and per-window refresh/workspace binding.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn continues the same implementation thread, refining requirements for the existing standalone extension, so `continue` fits. The Project Assistant explanation and earlier hookup work are resolved/off-path and can leave the next-turn raw prompt. The active task still depends on the recent product decisions and the immediately preceding discussion about new-window behavior, so those should remain available, with key design rules also preserved as pins.
